calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Confirm The Terms Of The Luz Maria Fernandez Trust And Of The Witnessed Trust Amendment Thereto
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Rueppel specially appearing for and with Norma Fernandez (Petitioner).
Diane Heitman (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Rueppel explained that the Attorney of record was unable to be here due to a health issue. The Court stated that the document doesn't meet the formal requirement of a trust amendment, that the document reads the Decedent's wish to change her will which is a pour over will, and that it's not an amendment to the Trust, but an amendment to the will. Mr. Rueppel stated that he believes when the Settlor drafted the amendment she had the lack of clarity like most of the general public with regard to the term will and Trust, that although it was not notarized, it was witnessed, that the witness is here today and pointed out that she (the Witness) is to receive less under the amendment. Mr. Rueppel also stated that there is no disagreement between the relatives and the Partner of the Decedent, that if it is construed as a codicil to the will it will defeat Ms. Fernandez's intent to distribute the property as intended in the amendment, that he does not think it will transfer the property outside of the Trust and into the Estate, that he is not aware of anyone objecting and that he believes everyone affected has consented. Ms. Heitman stated that all of the family and friends are in agreement, and that this is what Luz wanted. The Petition for An Order to Confirm The Terms of The Luz Maria Fernandez Trust and of the Witnessed Trust Amendment Thereto is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chu. Not reported.
